list.empty.title: Nothing to show yet
list.empty.noData: The list is empty. Sign in to the admin to add your first taste.

error.network: The server is not responding. Try again in a moment.
login.title: Admin
login.error.locked: Account locked after too many attempts. Try again later.
login.error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute.
password.title: New password required
password.intro: To secure your instance, choose a new password before continuing.
password.mismatch: The two entries do not match.
password.hint: At least 12 characters, with an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a digit and a special character.
password.error.PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password too predictable: make it longer or more varied.
password.error.PASSWORD_MISSING_UPPER: Add at least one uppercase letter.
password.error.PASSWORD_MISSING_LOWER: Add at least one lowercase letter.
password.error.PASSWORD_MISSING_SPECIAL: Add at least one special character.
password.error.PASSWORD_CONTAINS_USERNAM: The password must not contain the username.
admin.title: Admin
admin.empty: No taste yet. Create the first one!
admin.col.title: Title
form.title: Title
form.date.hint: Year only, year + month, or full date: e.g. the film's release or when you added the recipe.
form.image.hint: JPEG, PNG or WebP, 5 MB max. The image is recompressed automatically.
form.image.error: Invalid or too large image (5 MB max).
form.location.hint: For a restaurant, for example. Leave empty if not relevant.
form.location.invalid: Latitude between -90 and 90, longitude between -180 and 180, both filled or none.
form.section.subtitle: Subtitle (optional)
form.section.text: Text (Markdown supported, ||spoiler|| to hide a passage)
form.links.label: Label
form.links.hint: Wikipedia, IMDb, official site… to learn more.
form.published.hint: Uncheck to keep this entry as a draft, invisible to visitors.
form.error.INVALID_URL: One of the URLs is invalid.
form.error.generic: Could not save: check the fields.
categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.statuses.hint: The statuses offered for tastes in this category, in order.
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete the category "{{name}}"? Its statuses will be removed.
categories.error.inUse: Cannot delete: some tastes still use this category.
io.title: Import / Export
io.import.hint: Documented format: a file may contain one or several tastes, with a base64 image if needed. A known id updates the existing entry.
io.import.invalidFile: This file is not a valid Taster export.
